metadata.description: Structured for GSAP-based animation. Each verse contains the full text plus an array of phrases broken at natural punctuation boundaries.

gsap_usage.verse_by_verse: Iterate `verses[]` and animate each verse's `text` field.
gsap_usage.phrase_by_phrase: Iterate `verses[].phrases[]` and animate each phrase independently.
gsap_usage.stagger_hint: Use gsap.from('.phrase', { autoAlpha:0, y:20, stagger:0.15 }) or timeline.fromTo().

verses.text: From: Paul (Jesus Christ's God-ordained ambassador) along with Timothy (our brother in Christ).
phrases: From:
Paul (Jesus Christ's God-ordained ambassador) along with Timothy (our brother in Christ).

verses.text: To: the holy people who are also faithful brothers and sisters who live in the body of Christ and who live in the city of Colossae.  Dear God: please give them Your grace and peace through Your Son.
phrases: To:
the holy people who are also faithful brothers and sisters who live in the body of Christ and who live in the city of Colossae.
Dear God:
please give them Your grace and peace through Your Son.

verses.text: Timothy and I keep on thanking God the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ whenever we pray for you,
phrases: Timothy and I keep on thanking God the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ whenever we pray for you,

verses.text: because we have heard about your saving faith in Christ Jesus, and your love for all the other holy people,
phrases: because we have heard about your saving faith in Christ Jesus,
and your love for all the other holy people,

verses.text: because you have someone worth your confidence in a safety deposit box in the heavens, which you already heard about in the true message—the Gospel,
phrases: because you have someone worth your confidence in a safety deposit box in the heavens,
which you already heard about in the true message—the Gospel,

verses.text: which you received just like everyone else across the world, and it produces the same effects in you too. You produce fruit like a tree, and you grow like little children. This growth has been happening ever since you heard and truly came to fully-know God's saving grace;
phrases: which you received just like everyone else across the world,
and it produces the same effects in you too.
You produce fruit like a tree, and you grow like little children.
This growth has been happening ever since you heard and truly came to fully-know God's saving grace;

verses.text: this is what you learned from your pastor Epaphras, who is our co-worker and who is a faithful servant of Christ on your behalf,
phrases: this is what you learned from your pastor Epaphras,
who is our co-worker and who is a faithful servant of Christ on your behalf,

verses.text: he is the one who let us know about your love that comes from the Holy Spirit.
phrases: he is the one who let us know about your love that comes from the Holy Spirit.

verses.text: Because of what we have heard about you, we have not quit praying for you ever since. We are constantly requesting that God would fill you with the full-knowledge of his will with all wisdom and spiritual understanding,
phrases: Because of what we have heard about you,
we have not quit praying for you ever since.
We are constantly requesting that God would fill you with the full-knowledge of his will with all wisdom and spiritual understanding,

verses.text: all this for the purpose that you should walk in a manner worthy of the Lord, pleasing Him in every area of life: by bearing fruit in every good work; by growing up like little children into the full-knowledge of God;
phrases: all this for the purpose that you should walk in a manner worthy of the Lord,
pleasing Him in every area of life:
by bearing fruit in every good work;
by growing up like little children into the full-knowledge of God;

verses.text: by being empowered with all God's power, in accordance with the sheer might of his blinding glory, enabling you to have patience and endurance along with joy;
phrases: by being empowered with all God's power,
in accordance with the sheer might of his blinding glory,
enabling you to have patience and endurance along with joy;

verses.text: and by giving thanks to God the Father, the one who made us able to receive a bright inheritance given only to believers,
phrases: and by giving thanks to God the Father,
the one who made us able to receive a bright inheritance given only to believers,

verses.text: the same God who also rescued us from a dark and defeated kingdom and transferred our citizenship into his Kingdom of love and of his Son
phrases: the same God who also rescued us from a dark and defeated kingdom and transferred our citizenship into his Kingdom of love and of his Son

verses.text: who provides those united with him the breaking of sin's chains, which is the same as forgiveness from sin.
phrases: who provides those united with him the breaking of sin's chains,
which is the same as forgiveness from sin.

verses.text: He is the member of the invisible Godhead who is physically seen and holds the firstborn rights over all creation,
phrases: He is the member of the invisible Godhead who is physically seen and holds the firstborn rights over all creation,

verses.text: because within him, all things were created (in heaven, on earth, visible, invisible, even positions of power such as presidents, governors, mayors, and other such authorities). All these things were created through his working and for his pleasure.
phrases: because within him,
all things were created (in heaven,
on earth,
visible,
invisible,
even positions of power such as presidents,
governors,
mayors,
and other such authorities).
All these things were created through his working and for his pleasure.

verses.text: Christ also existed before the entire universe, the universe which he also holds together with his own power.
phrases: Christ also existed before the entire universe,
the universe which he also holds together with his own power.

verses.text: He is also the head of the Body—the Church—and the one who founded the Church.  Furthermore, Christ holds the firstborn rights over the realm of the dead.  He has accomplished and has become all these things for the purpose of holding his rightful first place in all things.
phrases: He is also the head of the Body—the Church—and the one who founded the Church.
Furthermore,
Christ holds the firstborn rights over the realm of the dead.
He has accomplished and has become all these things for the purpose of holding his rightful first place in all things.

verses.text: This rightful position is a result of the fact that God was delighted for his full deity to live permanently within Christ.
phrases: This rightful position is a result of the fact that God was delighted for his full deity to live permanently within Christ.

verses.text: God was also pleased to use Christ to reconcile all Christ's own creation back to himself. Christ accomplished this reconciliation was by making peace through his shed blood on the cross.  Remember, the reconciliation of the entire universe was done through Christ.
phrases: God was also pleased to use Christ to reconcile all Christ's own creation back to himself.
Christ accomplished this reconciliation was by making peace through his shed blood on the cross.
Remember,
the reconciliation of the entire universe was done through Christ.

verses.text: Even consider each of you individually, who were at one time fugitives from God and his enemies because of your evil thoughts and actions.
phrases: Even consider each of you individually,
who were at one time fugitives from God and his enemies because of your evil thoughts and actions.

verses.text: You are now reconciled by the actual death of Christ's physical body, so that you can be presented before God as set-apart, unblemished sacrifices, no longer enduring the blame of sin.
phrases: You are now reconciled by the actual death of Christ's physical body,
so that you can be presented before God as set-apart,
unblemished sacrifices,
no longer enduring the blame of sin.

verses.text: I know this since you actually are continuing in true Christianity, with a result that you have been made strong, steadfast, and unable to be moved from your confidence in the Gospel being preached all across the world, a task for which I, Paul, have become a servant.
phrases: I know this since you actually are continuing in true Christianity,
with a result that you have been made strong,
steadfast,
and unable to be moved from your confidence in the Gospel being preached all across the world,
a task for which I,
Paul,
have become a servant.

verses.text: Now consider this: I am rejoicing in the midst of my sufferings for the advantage of you Gentiles, and I am physically completing what's lacking from the afflictions Christ experienced. Similarly, Christ experienced afflictions for the advantage of his body, which is the Church.
phrases: Now consider this:
I am rejoicing in the midst of my sufferings for the advantage of you Gentiles,
and I am physically completing what's lacking from the afflictions Christ experienced.
Similarly,
Christ experienced afflictions for the advantage of his body,
which is the Church.

verses.text: This Church is whom I serve in accordance with divine office which was given to me for the purpose of completing what's lacking—the spread of the Message from God.
phrases: This Church is whom I serve in accordance with divine office which was given to me for the purpose of completing what's lacking—the spread of the Message from God.

verses.text: Specifically, I spread the Message about a mystery hidden throughout all time. But suddenly it has been revealed to God's holy people.
phrases: Specifically,
I spread the Message about a mystery hidden throughout all time.
But suddenly it has been revealed to God's holy people.

verses.text: To these people, God desires to make a grand display of His bright glory: Christ in you, even in the Gentiles, which gives you confidence in ultimate glorification.
phrases: To these people,
God desires to make a grand display of His bright glory:
Christ in you,
even in the Gentiles,
which gives you confidence in ultimate glorification.

verses.text: We preach this Christ by counseling and teaching every person with God's wisdom, in order that we can stand with them as completely sanctified in and before Christ Jesus.
phrases: We preach this Christ by counseling and teaching every person with God's wisdom,
in order that we can stand with them as completely sanctified in and before Christ Jesus.

verses.text: This ultimate presentation drives me to work like a slave and run like an athlete in accordance with God's own energetic working, which works in me with dynamic power.
phrases: This ultimate presentation drives me to work like a slave and run like an athlete in accordance with God's own energetic working,
which works in me with dynamic power.
